headline: Jim Cramer on Howmet Aerospace: “It’s Just in The Sweet Spot”
summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) is one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s game plan. Cramer was bullish on the stock, as he commented: One other… Howmet, terrific aerospace parts company, gives a presentation about its technology on Tuesday. It seems that almost every time this company speaks, its stock jumps. We joke about how much […]
